note: Awkward phrasing . I like the idea of giving someone a heads up on players they've collected, but it seems random not to have a call to action. I think the right call to action would be to show other moments from that same player that have dropped more recently that the user doesn't have. Anytime a hot player is moving, we email people who have collected that player and we try to encourage them to go collect the rest of that player's moments. Doesn't that make the most sense? This is super important. Listen to me.
